name: @ehrbase-ui/openehr-am
description: openEHR Archetype Model — targets ADL 1.4 / OPT 1.4 to match EHRbase 2.31.0 (per ADR-0032 addendum), NOT AOM2 2.3.0. Hand-typed narrow scope: only the OPT subset needed for web-template hydration; raw form consumption lives in @ehrbase-ui/openehr-web-template.
